meta_description: Angelo Ortiz Vega — Fullstack AI Engineer based in Costa Rica. I build and ship AI-powered products, lead technical initiatives, and bring ML from research to production. 4+ years in startups and product teams.
hero_txt_keywords: Fullstack AI Engineer · Tech Lead · Builder
hero_txt_about: I build software that creates real business value. As a Fullstack AI Engineer and Tech Lead, I specialize in shipping AI-powered products, scalable systems, and automation solutions — owning the full stack from architecture and ML integration to the interfaces people use.
about_text_desc_1: Hello! I'm Angelo Ortiz Vega — a Fullstack AI Engineer, Tech Lead, and University Lecturer. I build software that creates real business value, specializing in turning complex challenges into AI-powered products, scalable systems, and automation solutions. My work sits at the intersection of software engineering, artificial intelligence, and product development — where technology drives meaningful outcomes for users and organizations.
about_text_desc_2: My work spans the full product lifecycle: designing and shipping full-stack applications, REST APIs, cloud-native solutions, and ML systems across startups and product companies. I help teams move faster, automate repetitive processes, and integrate AI effectively — owning business-critical domains, driving architectural decisions with a cross-functional team of 20+, and partnering with Data Science to bring ML capabilities into production.
about_text_desc_3_1: I am currently completing a degree in Computer Engineering at the
about_text_desc_3_2: , building a strong theoretical foundation in systems and architecture. Alongside, I have spent more than three years as a University Lecturer — teaching Artificial Intelligence, Data Analysis, Machine Learning, and Full Stack Development at
about_text_desc_4_1: In parallel, I have worked as a university lecturer for over three years, teaching Artificial Intelligence, Data Analysis, Full Stack Development, and UX Design at
about_text_desc_4_2: — bridging academia and industry through hands-on, project-based learning.
about_text_desc_5: When I'm not at the computer, I'm usually hiking, reading, hanging out with friends, or curating
about_text_desc_5_a: When I'm not at the computer, I'm usually hiking, reading, hanging out with friends,
skills_text_subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with
experience_text_subtitle: Roles where I've led and shipped products.
jobs_ucreativa: Design and deliver industry-focused courses in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Analysis, Python Development, AWS, and Full Stack Software Engineering.
Mentor students through the creation of production-ready applications, AI solutions, and capstone projects aligned with current industry practices and emerging technologies.
Authored and structured the complete UX Design Certification Program, developing curriculum, learning outcomes, practical workshops, and evaluation frameworks.
Bridge academia and industry by integrating real-world case studies, agile methodologies, cloud technologies, and modern software engineering practices into the classroom.
Help prepare the next generation of developers, AI practitioners, and product professionals through hands-on, project-based learning experiences.
jobs_freelancer1: Delivered more than 15 custom software solutions for startups, entrepreneurs, and organizations — ranging from marketing platforms and web applications to automation systems and cloud-native APIs.
Led projects end-to-end: requirements gathering, solution architecture, development, deployment, and ongoing support.
Designed and implemented scalable systems using React, Node.js, Python, and AWS, helping clients improve operational efficiency and accelerate digital transformation.
Collaborated directly with founders and business stakeholders to translate business challenges into practical, maintainable, and scalable software products.
Built automation solutions and custom integrations that reduced manual processes and enabled clients to focus on growth and core business activities.
jobs_creai: Lead the development of AI-powered products and mission-critical logistics solutions, taking ownership of core platform capabilities that support day-to-day business operations.
Own key business domains including routes, services, and trip management systems — building the operational backbone of a large-scale logistics platform serving customers in Mexico.
Architect, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications and APIs using React, Ember.js, Laravel, PHP, and Python.
Collaborate cross-functionally with a team of 20+ professionals — engineers, designers, product owners, delivery managers, and AI specialists — to deliver high-impact product initiatives.
Drive technical decisions, system design discussions, and implementation strategies to ensure scalability and alignment with business objectives.
Partner with Data Science and Product teams to integrate AI and ML capabilities into production, accelerating automation and operational efficiency.
jobs_easyhop: Contributed to the development of both driver and passenger platforms, delivering business-critical functionality across mobile and web applications.
Developed the driver mobile application, implementing route management, map integrations, pickup workflows, and geolocation-based experiences using OpenStreetMap technologies.
Led a UX research initiative that identified product opportunities and influenced strategic investment in a web-based driver platform, supporting business growth and operational improvements.
Collaborated with product stakeholders to design and implement features that improved user experience, route visibility, and operational workflows.
Expanded responsibilities from mobile development to full-stack product development, contributing to frontend, backend, and product-focused initiatives across the platform ecosystem.
jobs_qubosystems: Served as technical lead for the development of a payroll management platform for a private university, coordinating a team of 5 developers and driving architectural and implementation decisions.
Designed and developed a machine learning module that automated faculty salary classification processes, improving efficiency and reducing manual administrative effort.
Built a faculty information management platform enabling academic staff to manage profile data and publish content to the university's public-facing 'Claustro Docente' portal.
Developed secure REST APIs, administrative platforms, and frontend applications using React and modern backend technologies.
Designed and implemented a data encryption module for a third-party mobile point-of-sale solution used by a Costa Rican banking institution.
Delivered solutions across the full software lifecycle: architecture, development, testing, deployment, and stakeholder collaboration.
jobs_csi: Corrective and preventive maintenance of electrical equipment.
Support to engineers in the development and design of electronic equipment that will improve the cap production process.
Accompaniment in the elaboration of the main electrical maintenance plan of the plant.
projects_angelortizvcom: angelortizv.com is a website where whenever I have the opportunity, I leave a few minutes of what I am doing to share what I am learning or what I am thinking.
projects_easyhop: Problem: drivers had no single app to see routes, stops, and validate passenger tickets. I built the driver mobile app end-to-end — map with stop points, routes, and ticket validation — a core product the platform still uses today.
projects_topspinai: Problem: coaches and analysts had no automated way to analyze table tennis video for ball bounces and net hits. I built an AI system using computer vision (ball detection and semantic segmentation) so they can get real-time insights from match footage.
projects_aiengineering: A structured knowledge base built chapter by chapter from Chip Huyen's AI Engineering (O'Reilly, 2025). Covers foundation models, evaluation, fine-tuning, and how to ship reliable AI applications to production — organized for quick review in reading order.
projects_uxarc: ux-arc is a personal blog and repository dedicated to sharing knowledge, experiences, and resources about the world of user experience design. Over the years, I have collected valuable information on various aspects of digital design, and this space was born with the intention of organizing and disseminating that knowledge in an accessible way for those looking to improve their skills and understanding in the field of UX.
projects_ceitcr: ce-itcr is the repository where the programming projects that I have carried out throughout my career in Computer Engineering courses are housed. The respective documentation on each course and code is on github.
projects_ngClone: This is a Google Keep clone built with Angular to practice and improve my Angular skills. It follows the original app's design principles and includes many core features.
projects_karaoke: Karaoke is a project for the course SOA41D - Software Architecture. A simple Karaoke Streaming App build with React for the Front-end and Nodejs for Server-side.
projects_es369ims: Inventory Management System is an inventory service where products in stock are displayed through categories. Its data source is Excel, so that administrators can access the data more easily.
projects_itcrCourses: itcr-courses is the repository of my notes in the career of Computer Engineering. The principal purpose of this repository is record some of the data of the courses by the computer engineering degree program of the ITCR.
projects_spaceInvaders: Space Invaders is a Japanese shooting video game released in 1978 by Taito. In the original planning for the game, they had planned to have the aliens be human soldiers. Taito figured that they did not want to send the message that shooting humans was ok, so they changed it to aliens.
projects_pacman: Pac-Man is a 1980 maze action video game developed and released by Namco for arcades. I made a clone of the famous game in C ++ and Qt to apply concepts that I learned in courses on Algorithms and Data Structures.
blog_section_intro: Recent writing on software, AI, and what I'm learning.
gallery_text_title: Some things from my life in pictures
contact_text_desc: Although I'm not currently looking for freelance opportunities, my inbox is always open. If you have any questions or just want to say hello, I'll do my best to get back to you!
contact_text_cta: Let's build your next AI-powered product.
full_archive_text_subtitle: A big list of things I've worked on
